hakofytFertilizersPage.title: Hakofyt fertilizer – organic NPK fertilizer for lawns, vegetables and fruit
hakofytFertilizersPage.description: Hakofyt fertilizer combines organic components, NPK nutrients and micro-elements. Choose Hakofyt Plus for vegetables and fruit trees or Hakofyt Max for a dense green lawn.

meta.title: Hakofyt fertilizer and Hakofyt Plus | Organic NPK fertilizer | GardenYX
meta.description: Compare Hakofyt fertilizers for lawns, vegetables, fruit trees and flowers. Find out which Hakofyt Plus or Hakofyt Max fits your garden best.

principle.title: How Hakofyt fertilizers work
principle.subtitle: Precisely Balanced Nutrient Ratio
principle.paragraph1: The effect of Hakofyt fertilizers is based on one of the fundamental principles of nutrition, known as Liebig's Law of the Minimum. Even when a plant has most nutrients in surplus, its growth is limited by the component that is currently missing.
principle.paragraph2: The Hakofyt range was developed to provide comprehensive plant nutrition. In addition to basic macro-elements in optimal ratios, Hakofyt fertilizers include micro-elements such as iron, zinc, manganese, copper, boron and molybdenum, supporting healthy growth and high-quality harvests.

featuredProducts.title: All Hakofyt fertilizers
featuredProducts.description: Browse the full selection of Hakofyt foliar fertilizers for flowers, trees, fruit, vegetables, and lawns.

vitality.title: Natural Vitality Boosters
vitality.description: Enriched with humic substances, amino acids and carbohydrates that support root formation, optimize photosynthesis and improve the overall plant metabolism.

resistance.title: High Resistance & Savings
resistance.description: It boosts immunity against cold, drought and diseases. Its natural repellent and fungicidal effects reduce the need for expensive protective sprays, lowering your costs.

synergy.title: Synergistic & Eco-Friendly
synergy.description: The ingredients work together for maximum absorption and help prevent soil contamination. This unique complex lowers the risk of overdosing and ensures higher crop quality.

roi.title: Proven High Return on Investment
roi.description: Field trials confirm that the yield increase significantly outweighs the cost. For example, 1 liter of Hakofyt increased potato harvest by 200 kg. Learn more about solving modern nutrition challenges in the expert article by Ing. Koziak.

npk.title: What is NPK fertilizer and why does it matter?
npk.intro: Every plant fertilizer is characterized by three key macro-elements – nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P) and potassium (K). Their ratio determines how fast a plant grows, how it flowers and what harvest it will produce.

n.name: Nitrogen
n.description: Drives lush leafy growth, deep green color and chlorophyll production. Nitrogen deficiency causes yellowing and stunted growth.

p.name: Phosphorus
p.description: Essential for root system development, flower and fruit formation. Supports energy transfer in cells and speeds up crop ripening.

k.name: Potassium
k.description: Strengthens cell walls and improves resistance to drought, frost and disease. Enhances flavor, firmness and shelf life of fruit.

npk.closing: Hakofyt complements NPK with micro-elements (Fe, Zn, Mn, Cu, B, Mo) and natural growth stimulators – humic substances and amino acids – which standard mineral fertilizers typically do not contain.

organic.title: Organic fertilizer vs. mineral: what is the difference?
organic.intro: Not all fertilizers work the same way. Choosing the right fertilizer significantly affects not only the current harvest but also the long-term health of the soil and plants.
organic.compareTitle: Hakofyt – the best of both worlds
organic.compareText: Hakofyt combines the precision of a mineral NPK fertilizer with the benefits of organic components. It contains humic substances, amino acids and carbohydrates that improve soil biological activity and increase nutrient efficiency – without the soil salinization risk typical of purely mineral fertilizers.

what.question: What is Hakofyt?
what.answer: Hakofyt is a range of foliar fertilizers and growth stimulators that combines essential nutrients, trace elements and natural support substances for healthier plant growth.

types.question: Which Hakofyt fertilizer should I choose?
types.answer: Hakofyt B is suited for specialized growing of flowers, strawberries, blueberries or citrus plants, Hakofyt Plus targets vegetables, fruit trees and seedling starts, and Hakofyt Max is designed for lawns and plants with higher nitrogen demand.

use.question: What are Hakofyt fertilizers used for?
use.answer: Hakofyt fertilizers are used to support root systems, photosynthesis, stress resistance and crop quality in vegetables, fruit, ornamental plants, trees and lawns.

whatIsNpk.question: What is NPK fertilizer?
whatIsNpk.answer: NPK fertilizer contains three main nutrients: nitrogen (N) for leaf growth, phosphorus (P) for roots and flowers, and potassium (K) for resistance and fruit quality. Hakofyt is an NPK fertilizer enriched with micro-elements and organic stimulators that increase overall nutritional efficiency.

whatIsOrganic.question: What is organic fertilizer?
whatIsOrganic.answer: Organic fertilizer contains nutrients bound in organic matter – humic substances, amino acids, compost or plant extracts. It improves soil structure and supports soil microorganisms. Hakofyt combines organic components with a precise NPK ratio, achieving both fast and long-term effects.

bestFertilizer.question: What is the best fertilizer for the garden?
bestFertilizer.answer: The best garden fertilizer depends on the plants and soil condition. Generally, a foliar NPK fertilizer with organic stimulators – like Hakofyt – delivers rapidly available nutrients while also improving soil microbiology. Hakofyt Max is ideal for lawns, while Hakofyt Plus is best for vegetables and fruit.
